root_cause_candidates.cause: Frontend service itself exhibits CPU fault symptoms with no accompanying error logs in the observed window; no clear upstream/downstream cascade identified. TCB-RCA places the symptom service as the initial node in propagation, effectively treating the frontend as the root cause in this constrained view.
root_cause_candidates.reasoning: Logs show no error entries to anchor a root-cause chain; topology analysis cannot pinpoint a single upstream cause due to multiple dependencies feeding the frontend, so it does not select a specific root. The deterministic TCB-RCA baseline ranks frontend as the initial node in the propagation path, which aligns with treating the symptom service as the root in absence of observable upstream faults. Given the lack of observable logs and multiple plausible upstream paths, confidence remains low.

metadata.llm_reasoning: Frontend depends on multiple downstream services; a fault in any of these dependencies could propagate to frontend and produce the symptom. The topology provides no single downstream culprit, only a set of potential upstream (dependency) services. Therefore, multiple plausible propagation paths exist from different dependencies to the symptom. The blast radius is currently limited to the symptom service in the given topology, but monitoring the high-impact dependencies (cartservice, productcatalogservice, checkoutservice) is prudent due to their critical role in functionality.

result.synthesis_reasoning: There is no observable error log data to identify a definitive upstream root cause. The topology analysis shows multiple potential upstream dependencies for the frontend, but no single path is causally established in the available window. The TCB-RCA baseline identifies the frontend as the starting point in the propagation model, consistent with treating the symptom service as root in the absence of corroborating upstream faults. Given the absence of logs and conflicting structural signals, the evidence converges weakly, favoring no stronger root cause than the frontend itself with low confidence.
